title: BEM-753 fix lint gate
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['scripts','.github/workflows','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 18:45 (UTC+3)'
commit_script=Path('scripts/commit_claude_dispatcher_state.sh')
commit_script.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env bash\nset -euo pipefail\ngit config user.name "github-actions[bot]"\ngit config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"\ngit add -A governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json governance/reports/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.md governance/tmp/claude_active.env || true\ngit diff --cached --quiet && echo "No changes" || git commit -m "BEM-753 Claude dispatcher state"\ngit pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true\ngit push || true\n''')
wf=Path('.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml')
text=wf.read_text(errors='ignore') if wf.exists() else ''
old='''      - name: Commit dispatcher state\n        if: always()\n        run: |\n          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"\n          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"\n          git add -A governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json governance/reports/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.md governance/tmp/claude_active.env || true\n          git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No changes" || git commit -m "BEM-746 Claude dispatcher state"\n          git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true\n          git push || true\n'''
new='''      - name: Commit dispatcher state\n        if: always()\n        run: bash scripts/commit_claude_dispatcher_state.sh\n'''
if old in text:
    text=text.replace(old,new)
elif 'Commit dispatcher state' in text and 'git config user.name' in text:
    parts=text.split('      - name: Commit dispatcher state',1)
    head=parts[0]
    tail=parts[1]
    marker='\n      - name:'
    idx=tail.find(marker)
    rest=tail[idx:] if idx!=-1 else ''
    text=head+new+rest
wf.write_text(text)
# Local lint check for new violation signature from this dispatcher.
wf_text=wf.read_text(errors='ignore')
checks=[
 {'name':'commit_script_exists','pass':commit_script.exists(),'evidence':str(commit_script)},
 {'name':'dispatcher_commit_uses_script','pass':'bash scripts/commit_claude_dispatcher_state.sh' in wf_text,'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'dispatcher_no_long_commit_block','pass':'git config user.name' not in wf_text,'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'workflow_has_no_inline_python_heredoc','pass':'python3 - <<' not in wf_text and '<<PY' not in wf_text,'evidence':str(wf)}]
failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
status='dispatcher_lint_gate_repaired' if not failed else 'failed'
blocker=None if not failed else {'code':'DISPATCHER_LINT_REPAIR_FAILED','failed':failed}
state={'schema_version':'fix_dispatcher_lint_gate_long_run.v1','bem':'BEM-753','status':status,'checks':checks,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem753_fix_dispatcher_lint_gate_long_run.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem753_fix_dispatcher_lint_gate_long_run.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-753 | Fix Dispatcher Lint Gate Long Run | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Dispatcher commit block moved to script.\nBlocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem753_fix_dispatcher_lint_gate_long_run','status':status,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem753_fix_dispatcher_lint_gate_long_run.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-753 '+status+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(commit_script),str(wf),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Moved long dispatcher commit run block into scripts/commit_claude_dispatcher_state.sh to satisfy workflow lint gate')
"""
No issue comments.
